name: learner-profile non-owner write path test missing profileId assertion
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-07] adult-non-owner variant uses bare toHaveBeenCalled() with no profileId check, unlike the parent-owner block. Fix: assert toHaveBeenCalledWith(...ADULT_NON_OWNER_PROFILE_ID...).
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: adult non-owner write-path tests in learner-profile.test.ts use bare toHaveBeenCalled(), so they do not prove the route passed ADULT_NON_OWNER_PROFILE_ID to the memory service. Variants: DELETE /v1/learner-profile/all and POST /v1/learner-profile/consent for an adult non-owner must both assert the exact profileId argument. Regression test: apps/api/src/routes/learner-profile.test.ts fails if the route calls the mocked service with an owner/active profile id and passes only when called with ADULT_NON_OWNER_PROFILE_ID.
